items.name: 馬頭観世音菩薩像
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 建造物

en.name_en: Image of the Horse-Headed Kannon Bosatsu
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category, an image of the horse-headed Kannon (Batō Kanzeon Bosatsu). It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 1992-12-08. Located at Nekoya aza Hiro 337-2.

items.name: 天正検地帳 下総国白井庄持草村御縄入水帳
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 古文書

en.name_romaji: Tenshō Kenchichō: Shimōsa no Kuni Shirai-no-shō Mochikusa-mura On-nawaire Mizuchō
en.name_en: Tenshō-Era Land Survey Register of Mochikusa Village, Shirai Manor, Shimōsa Province
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old documents category, a Tenshō-era land survey register of Mochikusa village, Shirai manor, Shimōsa Province. It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 1990-02-23. Kept at the Yachimata City Folk Museum.

items.name: 宝永元年勢田村用草村 地境争論裁許書
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 歴史資料

en.name_romaji: Hōei Gannen Seita-mura Yōsō-mura Jizakai Sōron Saikyosho
en.name_en: Adjudication Document of the Boundary Dispute between Seita and Yōsō Villages in the First Year of Hōei
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, an adjudication document concerning the land boundary dispute between Seita and Yōsō villages in the first year of the Hōei era. It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 1991-03-28. Kept at the Yachimata City Folk Museum.

items.name: 捕馬の図
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 歴史資料

en.name_en: Painting of Horse Catching
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a painting depicting horse catching. It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 1995-03-24. Privately held.

items.name: 捕馬の図 下絵
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 歴史資料

en.name_en: Preparatory Sketch for the Painting of Horse Catching
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a preparatory sketch for the painting of horse catching. It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 1995-03-24. Privately held.

items.name: 永沢社鬼瓦
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 歴史資料

en.name_en: Ridge-End Ogre Tile of Nagasawa Shrine
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a ridge-end ogre tile (onigawara) of Nagasawa Shrine. It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 1995-03-24. Kept at Nishū Elementary School.

items.name: 前山清一郎所用陣羽織
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 歴史資料

en.name_en: Battle Surcoat Used by Maeyama Seiichirō
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a battle surcoat (jinbaori) used by Maeyama Seiichirō. It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 2021-07-20. Kept at the Yachimata City Folk Museum.

items.name: こえっぱの弁天の下総型板碑
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 考古資料

en.name_romaji: Koeppa no Benten no Shimōsa-gata Itabi
en.name_en: Shimōsa-Type Stone Slab Monument of the Koeppa Benten
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a Shimōsa-type stone slab monument (itabi) at the Koeppa Benten. It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 2023-10-04. Located at Hijikai aza Dainoshita 81-1.

items.name: 額絵馬「捕馬の図」
items.subcategory: 有形民俗文化財

en.name_en: Framed Votive Picture 'Painting of Horse Catching'
en.description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, a framed votive picture (ema) titled 'Toba no Zu' (painting of horse catching). It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 1992-12-08. Located at the Okada Batō Kanzeon Hall.

items.name: 岡田馬頭観世音幟
items.subcategory: 有形民俗文化財

en.name_en: Banners of the Okada Horse-Headed Kannon
en.description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, banners (nobori) of the Okada horse-headed Kannon. It was municipally designated by Yachimata City on 1998-03-24. Held by Hōsenji Temple.
